title: ERCOT Estimated Coincident Peak Load CSV download
description:
This dataset contains key data series related to coincident peak intervals in ERCOT as well as an estimated coincident peak load value, all in real-time. There are four fifteen-minute coincident peak intervals each year, one in each of the summer months. The estimated value in this dataset utiliizes operational load and real-time storage operations in ERCOT. 

The dataseries comprising this dataset are real-time operational data and should not be used in place of settlement data.
